name: scrappy-suite
description: A freeware Electron workspace from Ravenforge Creations Studio with panels for writing, files, planning, and help.

scripts.check: node -e "const { readdirSync } = require('node:fs'); const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const files = ['main.js', 'preload.js', 'renderer.js', ...readdirSync('modules').filter((file) => file.endsWith('.js')).map((file) => `modules/${file}`)]; for (const file of files) { const result = spawnSync(process.execPath, ['--check', file], { stdio: 'inherit' }); if (result.status) process.exit(result.status); }"
scripts.build:icon: node -e "const { writeFileSync } = require('node:fs'); const pngToIco = require('png-to-ico').default; pngToIco('assets/icons/scrappy-suite-icon.png').then((buffer) => writeFileSync('assets/icons/scrappy-suite-icon.ico', buffer));"
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm audit --omit=dev && npm run pack
